function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_epaper_panel
alias: hearthline_epaper_panel
purchased_on: 2025-12-26
total_eur: 66
counterparty: Pimoroni Europe SARL
project: Hearthline
related_entity: NORA
lines:
  - item: 7.5 inch e-paper panel
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 54
    line_eur: 54
  - item: mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 12
    line_eur: 12
---
# Kitchen summary display parts

```text
+----------------+------------------------------+
| field          | value                        |
+----------------+------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                         |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_epaper_panel |
| alias          | hearthline_epaper_panel      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-26                   |
| total_eur      | 66                           |
| counterparty   | Pimoroni Europe SARL         |
| project        | Hearthline                   |
| related_entity | NORA                         |
+----------------+------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 7.5 inch e-paper panel               | 1   | 54       | 54       |
| 2 | mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet | 1   | 12       | 12       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                                |     |          | 66       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the first Hearthline experiments for a calm kitchen-facing weekly view.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context); read required system and nested AGENTS/workflow/schema docs before task work; applied inbox-processing + migration rules; deleted inbox only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to NORA. Router preflight identified exactly one related bill file: 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md. That file contained all required bill fields and line items, enabling schema-compliant frontmatter extraction per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md without guessing. After updating, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
